items.description: I’m a fan. I can't remember the last time I got excited about a fan. items.title: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an unfinished, irresistibly weird dice-based RPG
items.description: From its opening minutes, Moves of the Diamond Hand is upfront about what it offers: You're going to have a lot of strange conversations, and you're going to roll a lot of dice. Get on board with this proposition, and the reward is one of the most creative roleplaying games I've seen in years, even ...
